title: sonchus tenerrimus subsp. pustulatus
intro: Sonchus tenerrimus subsp. pustulatus, also known as tender sowthistle or thistle of the sea, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Sonchus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to possess medicinal properties. The health benefits of Sonchus tenerrimus subsp. pustulatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a valuable herb for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
